name: @ondewo/t2s-client-nodejs
description: ONDEWO Text to Speech (T2S) Client library for Nodejs
author: ONDEWO GmbH <office@ondewo.com>

scripts.pretest: tsc src/auth/offlineTokenProvider.ts src/auth/offlineTokenProvider.spec.ts --ignoreConfig --module commonjs --target es2020 --strict --lib es2020,dom --skipLibCheck --sourceMap --types node --typeRoots ./node_modules/@types --outDir .test-build
scripts.posttest: npm run typecheck:examples && npm run test:examples
scripts.typecheck:examples: tsc examples/synthesizeExample.ts examples/synthesizeExample.spec.ts --noEmit --ignoreConfig --module commonjs --target es2020 --strict --lib es2020,dom --skipLibCheck --types node --typeRoots ./node_modules/@types
